title: lepigonum brevifolium var. laxiflorum

It is known for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, that may help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. The therapeutic actions of Lepigonum brevifolium var. laxiflorum are attributed to its bioactive constituents, which include limonoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, that have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antitumor activities. side_effects: Lepigonum brevifolium var. laxiflorum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and nausea, due to its high content of alkaloids.
